title: GitHub Maintainer Advisory
description: Invited to GitHub's Maintainer Advisory program for Pollinations.ai — a 4.5k+ star open-source Gen-AI platform. I build the contributor pipeline: payouts, triage automation, app-submission workflows, and AI-assisted PR review.

title: Speaking at GitHub
description: Speaking at GitHub Maintainer Month 2026 and GitHub Open Source Friday on building sustainable contributor pipelines at Pollinations.ai — lessons on turning first-time contributors into long-term maintainers.

title: OWASP JIS University
description: Community Strategist for the OWASP JIS University 2026-27 chapter — driving security-focused outreach, partnerships, and event programming for the campus community.

title: Kolkata Hacktoberfest
description: Co-hosted Kolkata's flagship Hacktoberfest meetup with 290+ participants — students through senior maintainers gathered for contribution sprints, lightning talks, and community networking.

title: Elixpo Search
description: A LangChain-based semantic search agent built and deployed on Azure for Pollinations.ai — searches the web dynamically, indexes results, and routes requests through an LLM for natural-language understanding.
